hints.noTimePressure: Take your time. No time limit or penalties.

phase1.securePerimeter: Secure the perimeter and wait for further instructions from command. Coordinates will be beamed directly to your devices.

phase3.title: Phase 3: Convergence Base
phase3.selectRoleDescription: Choose your assigned clearance level for the Convergence protocol. Each role provides optimized interfaces tailored to different cognitive approaches. Synchronization with team is required.

roleShield.name: Shield Operator
roleShield.description: High intensity, physical feedback, barrier maintenance.
roleShield.objective: Pump power into the stability grid! Do not let stability fall below 30% or the Code Breaker's systems will glitch critically.

roleCodebreaker.name: Code Breaker
roleCodebreaker.description: Calm routing puzzle, pattern recognition, systematic flow.
roleCodebreaker.objective: Connect all router nodes in sequence. System instability below 30% will introduce erratic hardware interference. Await Observer's target data to authorize final sequence.

roleObserver.name: Intel / Observer
roleObserver.description: AR Scanning, environment analysis, objective targeting.
roleObserver.objective: Monitor AR scanner above. Lock onto target symbols in physical space and broadcast data to assist the Code Breaker with their routing protocol.

phase3.observerAlignMarker: Align marker within the reticle to establish connection and locate symbols to assist the Code Breaker.
phase3.observerInfoText: The Convergence Network hinges on bridging physical space with digital architecture. Your Scanner is currently active and sweeping the immediate vicinity for spatial anomalies.
phase3.observerQuote: Scan the area carefully. Wait for the reticle to lock onto high-contrast visual markers. When acquired, broadcast the target data immediately. The Code Breaker cannot finish the sequence without this authorization key.
